trivia_bullets.text: Hour of Victory is a story spotlight card (story_spotlight: true) — a Scryfall-confirmed key narrative moment in the Aetherdrift storyline. It uses both the Start Your Engines! and Max Speed keywords, the two Speed-mechanic milestones introduced in DFT. EDHREC rank 13,563 — highest in this batch.

Hour of Victory enters, triggers Start Your Engines!, creates a 2/2 Zombie token, and at max speed (Speed 4) can be sacrificed at {1}{B} sorcery-speed to tutor any card. The tutor payoff gating behind max-speed is flavor-first design: you earn the tutor by going fast.

The title echoes the Amonkhet 'Hour' naming convention: AKH (2017) featured Hour of Devastation, Hour of Promise, Hour of Revelation, Hour of Eternity, and Hour of Glory — each naming a phase of Nicol Bolas's apocalyptic plan. 'Hour of Victory' reads as a deliberate inversion: where Bolas's Hours were catastrophes, the Champions of Amonkhet's hour in the Grand Prix is reclamation.
sources: Scryfall: story_spotlight flag; Amonkhet Hour cycle, cross-referenced via Scryfall

trivia_bullets.text: Hour of Victory carries no flavor text in its oracle data — unusual for a story spotlight card. The art and keywords carry the narrative weight.
